en.title: Take name
en.prompt: My baby will be born in June 2023. The father's last name is Li and the mother's last name is Hou. Can you help us choose a beautiful, auspicious, wise, and virtuous name for our child? Please derive the name from the Bible.
en.remark: Select a name for your child that carries a meaningful and beautiful significance, drawing inspiration from classical literature.

related.title: Travel itinerary
related.remark: Based on your travel destination, budget, time, and requirements, AI can roughly plan your trip. Contributed by @suaifu.

metaDescription: Naming a baby? Find beautiful, auspicious names derived from the Bible. Select names with meaningful spiritual significance.

faq.q: Do names the AI draws from Book of Songs or Chu Ci really have those sources?
faq.a: Common names (like "Zijin" or "Wanxi" from the Book of Songs) are accurate. Some are misattributed or the source fragment is invented. For important names, search the AI's "source" in the actual Book of Songs or Chu Ci text and replace if not found.

faq.q: How do I avoid names with high repetition rates?
faq.a: Append "avoid characters frequent in the past 10 years like Zi, Xuan, Han, Xuan, Yi, Zi, Yu." Without this the AI gives names with classical provenance that still collide with modern trends. Adding this line helps you find names with culture but uncommon use.
